description_long: This is a modern countertop microwave oven with a rectangular form factor and a predominantly white and black color scheme. The front features a large, dark-tinted glass window set in a black frame, allowing visibility into the cooking chamber, and a vertical control panel on the right side with a digital display, labeled buttons, and a prominent red start button. The top, left, and right sides are plain white with multiple horizontal ventilation slits for heat dissipation. The rear is metallic with a visible power cord, a mesh vent, and a service panel, indicating the location of internal components. The door handle is integrated vertically along the right edge of the door, blending seamlessly with the frame. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A sleek, rectangular microwave oven with a black glass front window, white body, and a vertical control panel featuring a digital display and labeled buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black glass window, vertical control panel with digital display, and integrated door handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain white surface with two rows of horizontal ventilation slits.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a metallic back panel, power cord, mesh vent, and service access panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with two rows of horizontal ventilation slits on a plain white surface.
attribute_brand_logo: A 'SHARP' brand logo is present at the top of the control panel on the front right, in white text on a black background, small and rectangular in shape.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right front side, featuring a digital display at the top, a large red circular start button below, and several smaller round and rectangular buttons arranged in a grid below the display. Each button is clearly labeled with icons or text, and the panel includes additional function indicators.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical strip integrated along the right edge of the door, matching the white frame, and is flush with the surface for a minimalist look. It appears to be made of plastic and is sized for a comfortable grip.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are located on both the left and right sides, arranged in two horizontal rows of rectangular slits near the top and bottom. The rear panel also features a large mesh vent and additional openings for heat dissipation.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, dark-tinted glass window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the interior.
